product_results.title: Nike Mens Air Jordan 1 Mid Se

summary.text: Customers find these shoes super comfortable and very supportive. They describe the shoes as great and awesome in terms of quality. The style receives positive feedback, with customers noting they are very stylish and cute. The color also gets praise from buyers. However, customers have mixed opinions about the fit.

authors_reviews.title: Fraud
authors_reviews.text: Wrong size and quality is very poor.
authors_reviews.author: Vishvdeep bhaniwal

authors_reviews.title: Not worth the brand!
authors_reviews.text: As cute as these are .. don’t waste your money.. the fabric in these didn’t last long ( holes in the fabric and they came apart from the seem) .. maybe a month of wear.. cheap made but over priced just for the brand.
authors_reviews.author: Elize M
